About Your Journey

Here we make your
dreams come true.

Whether you are travelling to study, give birth, go on vacation, or start a new chapter — Goodlife Travel is your dedicated partner every step of the way.

What is a Canada visitor visa and who needs one?+
Most Nigerian passport holders require a Temporary Resident Visa (TRV) to visit Canada. Our team handles the full application — documents, biometrics, and submission — with a 97% success rate.
How long does it take to get a Canada visa?+
Processing times vary between 4 to 12 weeks depending on visa type and season. We monitor your file throughout and keep you updated at every stage.
What is birth tourism and is it legal?+
Birth tourism is 100% legal. Canada grants citizenship by birthplace under the Citizenship Act. We arrange your visitor visa, hospital liaison, accommodation, and post-birth documentation.
Can I apply for a Canadian study permit from Nigeria?+
Yes. We handle university applications, acceptance letters, study permit applications, and accommodation setup — a full end-to-end package for students.
